content: The cafeteria food has improved a lot this semester. The meals are fresher and the portions are bigger. Staff are also friendlier now.
I love the campus ambience but the workload this semester is overwhelming. Professors are helpful but scheduling leaves little time to rest.
The library is always too crowded and hard to find a seat. Cleanliness is okay but the smell near the restrooms is terrible.
Registration service is extremely slow. I waited in queue for two hours just to get my documents processed. Very inefficient.
The campus atmosphere is peaceful and relaxing. I enjoy studying outdoors. The garden area near the science building is really beautiful.
Tuition fees keep increasing but the facilities are not improving. The price we pay should match the quality of experience we get.
Some professors are really professional and helpful. Others are rude and unprofessional. It really depends on who you get.
The cafeteria meals are getting worse. Food is bland and sometimes undercooked. For the price we pay it should taste better.
Overall my experience this semester has been positive. Classes are engaging and the staff in the admin office are always courteous and prompt.
The campus location is inconvenient. Transport access is poor and the shuttle schedule is unreliable. Hard to reach during peak hours.
Hygiene in the comfort rooms is really poor. They are rarely cleaned and always smell bad. This needs urgent attention from management.
I had a great experience attending the school fair. The atmosphere was lively and the food stalls had delicious and affordable meals.
The waiting time for guidance office service is way too long. The staff are polite but the process is slow and needs improvement.
Campus is clean and well-maintained overall. The grounds crew does a great job keeping everything spotless and the restrooms are decent.
Scholarship fees and miscellaneous charges are not transparent. Hidden charges keep appearing in the billing statement. Very frustrating.
The overall student experience is declining. Facilities are aging, food quality dropped, and staff responsiveness has gotten worse.
The new canteen renovation was worth it. Food choices are more varied, the area is clean, and the ambience is much more comfortable to eat in.
Professors this semester are very knowledgeable and professional. They respond quickly to messages and are genuinely helpful to students.
The campus vibe this semester feels off. Too much academic pressure and not enough support from staff. Mental health resources are lacking.
Service at the registrar has improved drastically. Staff are now more attentive and the queue system is faster and more organized.
The start of semester experience was rough. Enrollment was chaotic, food options were limited, and the campus felt disorganized overall.
